ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  "budget_allocation_history" TEXT /* History of budget allocations */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email contact for the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the time period (e.g., AM, PM, NT) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the time period */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "from_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the transaction originated */,
  "to_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the transaction was sent */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the transaction */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction type */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department that initiated the transaction */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period when the transaction occurred */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_value" REAL /* Monetary value of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Current status of the transaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transaction */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_to_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_from_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction history entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the transaction history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., department administrator, financial analyst, executive) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_departments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period */,
  "amount" REAL /* Budget amount allocated to the department for the time period */,
  "budget_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the budget period */,
  "budget_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the budget period */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the budget entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the budget entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_budgets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_budgets_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_budgets_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_budgets_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., weight, value) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the analytics entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the analytics entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_analytics_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_analytics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_analytics_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_reports_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_reports_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_reports_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the setting */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_settings_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_settings_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the error occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id")
)
